name: Sentri
answer1:
Yes, these
islands and
much more.
answer2:
I know but
one of three
syllables-'cor'.
question:
Dost thou know
the four cities
of courage?
no:
They are Jhelom,
Minoc, Trinsic
and Skara Brae.

name: the gate guard.
answer1:
These are the
gates to Serpent
castle.
question:
Art thou here to
find courage?
yes:
Then thou art at
the right place.
no:
Then perhaps to
become a guard!

name: Lassorn
answer2:
She went down in
the deep waters
of the bay in
the Cape of
Heroes!
question:
Ever heard
of her?

name: Roark
answer1:
The Great
Stygian Abyss
holds the codex
of ultimate
wisdom!
question: Art thou well?
yes:
Then strive to
find the secrets
of the abyss.
no:
Thou hast come
to the right
place.

name: a ranger.
answer1:
I train so that
I might survive
the dungeons!
answer2:
I plan to
conquer the
secret of the
altar rooms.
question: Dost thou?
yes:
Ask our teacher
about the rooms
for she knowns
much!

name: Shyra
job:
I train warriors
to fight with
courage!
answer1:
Train well and
thy courage can
grow with
confidence.
answer2:
In the altar
room of courage
use the red,
orange, purple
and white
stones!
question: Wilt thou train?

name: a baronial guard
answer2:
This castle is
built on
courage.
question:
Dost thou wish
an audience
with Sentri?

name: a treasure guard
answer1:
This treasure is
not for thee
answer2:
Seek out Durham
for knowledge of
dungeons.
question:
Dost thou intend
to steal
our lord's
treasure?

name: Garam
answer1:
Courage makes
kings out of
knaves!
answer2:
The bell of
courage lies at
the bottom of a
deep well at sea
found at
lat-N'A"
long-L'A"
question: Dost thou?

name: Durham
answer1:
I feel that when
on a quest my
life has
purpose!
answer2:
The altar room
of courage gives
the third part
of a key.
question:
Art thou on
a quest?

name: Lori
answer1:
He is in the
west chamber.
answer2:
He is in the
east chamber.
question:
Art thou looking
for someone?

name: Samuel
answer1:
He is in the
west chamber.
answer2:
He is in the
east chamber.
question:
Art thou looking
for someone?

name: Roderick
answer1:
It was eaten
by a zorn.
answer2:
An orb of blue
light will raise
thy strength,
dexterity or
intelligence,
but at a cost!
question:
Wilt thou give
me gold?

name: Sister Antos
answer2:
The bell of
courage is
needed to enter
the abyss.
question:
Dost thou
have it?
no:
Then ask the
fighter Garam
for he knows
where it lies!

name: Noxum
answer1:
There are many
ships at the
bottom!
answer2:
A survivor would
know where to
search.
question:
Hast thou
heard of the
H.M.S. Cape?
yes:
She had a
magical wheel
that would
strengthen her
hull!

name: Michelle
job:
I welcome thee
unto Serpent
Castle!
answer1:
He is the lord
here, take the
west passage.
question: Art thou well?
yes:
Very good,
perhaps thou
seeks Sentri.
no:
Then thou should
visit our
healer!
